title: Skyroot Aerospace does a SpaceX, offers Elon Musk-style Esops to its founders
snippet: Skyroot Aerospace founders Pawan Chandana and Naga Bharath Daka can get up to 4% equity if the spacetech startup launches a satellite and raises $100 million at a $1 billion valuation by December 2028.

title: Google confirms which OnePlus, Oppo, Xiaomi and Vivo phones are getting AirDrop support via Quick Share
snippet: Google is expanding Quick Share support for iPhones to more devices, including OnePlus, Oppo, Vivo, Samsung, Xiaomi, and Honor.&nbsp;

title: Bought a premium Android phone? Here are 5 reasons your next upgrade should be a Samsung Galaxy Watch
snippet: Samsung Galaxy Watches offer smart notifications, advanced health tracking, premium design, and seamless Samsung ecosystem features that make daily life more convenient and connected.

title: Motorola launches Razr Fold in India with dual AMOLED displays, price starts at  ₹1,49,999
snippet: Motorola has launched the Razr Fold with a 6.6-inch AMOLED external display, 8.1-inch main display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 processor, 6,000mAh battery, and 50MP camera.

title: Samsung reveals India release date for Android 17 powered One UI 9 beta: Check new features and how to install
snippet: Samsung brings Android 17 and a redesigned Quick Panel to India with the One UI 9 beta for the Galaxy S26

title: From Android to PC: 6 best handheld gaming devices to buy in 2026
snippet: With gaming on the move becoming more mainstream, manufacturers are introducing handheld consoles featuring upgraded displays, improved battery life, enhanced performance and support for modern gaming platforms across Android and PC ecosystems.

title: Google is turning Android into agentic AI system with Gemini Intelligence: Check features and release date
snippet: Google has introduced Gemini Intelligence at the Android Show 2026 to introduce AI-driven features to Android, allowing automation of tasks, improved autofill, and create custom widget.

title: From Googlebook to Gemini in Chrome: Top 5 biggest announcements from Android Show 2026
snippet: Google revealed major updates for Android ahead of I/O 2026, including a new laptop category called Googlebook, Gemini intelligence for and a redesign of Android Auto.&nbsp;

TSMC says global chip market to hit $1.5 trillion by 2030 as AI drives growth
snippet: TSMC predicts the global chip market will surpass $1.5 trillion by 2030. AI and high-performance computing will lead this growth. The company is expanding its advanced chip production and packaging capacity. New facilities are being built in Arizona, Japan, and Germany to meet future demand.

title: Nvidia CEO hopes Trump and Xi will improve two-way ties: CCTV
snippet: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang met with Chinese President Xi Jinping. He expressed hope for improved US-China relations. Nvidia faces difficulties supplying advanced AI chips to Chinese clients. This impacts their artificial intelligence development efforts.

title: Samsung Electronics urges union to resume talks as strike threat looms
snippet: Samsung's labour union has rejected a call to resume pay talks, demanding transparency in the company's bonus scheme.  A threatened 18-day strike looms if demands aren't met, with the government urging both sides to negotiate to protect South Korea's vital chip export economy.

title: US chip start-up Cerebras to raise $5.5 billion in IPO
snippet: Cerebras Systems is set to launch its IPO on Wall Street at $185 per share, aiming to raise approximately $5.5 billion and valuing the company at over $55 billion. This marks the largest US IPO this year, with the chip startup specializing in wafer-scale processors crucial for AI development.

title: Microsoft eyeing startup deals for life after OpenAI
snippet: Microsoft is actively seeking AI startups for potential acquisitions. This move aims to bolster its AI talent and develop a cutting-edge AI model independently. The company is reportedly in discussions with Inception, a startup focused on novel large language model development.

title: Nvidia CEO's foundation buys $108 million of AI computing from CoreWeave, donates it to researchers
snippet: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang and his wife are donating $108.3 million in computing time from CoreWeave to universities for AI research. This significant gift also bolsters CoreWeave, an AI cloud company in which Nvidia has invested heavily and secured substantial cloud capacity deals.

title: US defence firm Anduril raises $5 billion, doubling its valuation to $61 billion
snippet: Defence tech firm Anduril Industries has secured a massive $5 billion funding, catapulting its valuation to $61 billion. This surge follows a year of significant growth, with revenue doubling to $2.2 billion and workforce expansion. Investors are increasingly backing defence innovators amidst global

title: Ex-Peak XV trio raises Mettle; Fintechs go licence hunting
snippet: Happy Thursday! Three former Peak XV MDs, who abruptly left the VC firm, are launching Mettle Capital to back Indian startups. This and more in today's ETtech Morning Dispatch.

title: Mphasis playing host to a high-stakes game of executive musical chairs
snippet: Mphasis faces a wave of senior executive departures. Over a dozen high-performing leaders have left since 2025 for competitors such as Coforge and Tenarai. title: Activate picks stake in ElevenLabs in first global growth-stage AI bet
snippet: Venture capital firm Activate has made its first global growth-stage AI investment in ElevenLabs. This New York-based voice AI company considers India a key market.
